REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ZIPREALTY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, MICHAEL SON DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS FOLLOWS: 1. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FRAUDULENT CONCEALMENT, CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD, BREACH OF ORAL CONTRACT AND PROMISSORY ESTOPPEL IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF WAS GRANTED A LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS (NOT CONCLUSIONS) GIVING RISE TO DELAYED DISCOVERY. SEE FOX V. ETHICON ENDO-SURGERY, INC. (2005) 35 CAL. 4TH 797 AND WA SOUTHWEST 2, LLC V. FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INS. CO. (2015) 240 CAL.APP.4TH 148). PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DO SO. 2. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE EACH ELEMENT OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION NOT AMOUNTING TO FRAUD OR CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD, I.E. SUBJECTING THIS CAUSE OF ACTION TO A FOUR-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. 3. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF WRITTEN CONTRACT IS SUSTAINED WITH FINAL LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE EACH ELEMENT OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION INCLUDING CONSIDERATION AND OBLIGATIONS OF THE PARTIES. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kenneth Valinoti, (415)986-1338 for Defendant/Moving party Zip Realty.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ZIPREALTY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, MICHAEL SON DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained as follows:
1. Demurrer to the causes of action for fraudulent concealment, constructive fraud, breach of oral contract and promissory estoppel is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff was granted a leave to amend to allege facts (not conclusions) giving rise to delayed discovery. See Fox v. Ethicon Endo-Surgery, Inc. (2005) 35 Cal. 4th 797 and WA Southwest 2, LLC v. First American Title Ins. Co. (2015) 240 Cal.App.4th 148). Plaintiff failed to do so.
2. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege each element of this cause of action not amounting to fraud or constructive fraud, i.e. subjecting this cause of action to a four-year statute of limitations.
3. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of written contract is sustained with final leave to amend to allege each element of this cause of action including consideration and obligations of the parties. (See CACI 302).
4. Demurrer to the cause of action for UCL violation is sustained without leave to amend as no injury in fact is alleged. B&P 17204.
Plaintiff addressed the demurrer on the merits. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
